description_long: This is a single-propeller, fixed-wing airplane with a metallic, riveted fuselage and a distinctive color scheme featuring gray, blue, and yellow panels. The wings are straight and low-mounted, with visible roundels and markings, and the tail section is conventional with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The nose is painted yellow and houses a black, four-blade propeller, while the cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and positioned just behind the propeller. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tailwheel. The fuselage is adorned with various decals, including images and text, giving it a stylized, possibly vintage or custom appearance. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, maneuverable aircraft suitable for short flights or display in an urban environment.
description: A metallic, single-propeller airplane with a low-mounted wing, enclosed cockpit, and fixed landing gear, featuring a gray, blue, and yellow color scheme with decorative decals.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, highlighting the yellow nose, blue tail, and detailed riveted panels with visible decals.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the black four-blade propeller, symmetrical wing layout, and the cockpit canopy directly behind the nose.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, emphasizing the blue tail, yellow nose, and additional decals on the fuselage and wing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the blue tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the full span of the straight wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single piston engine with a nose-mounted four-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
